title: Jimas Veltraa

{{Quote|When the Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line became indefensible, Veltraa heroically reformed remnants of the Outer Rim fleets into a line protecting Taris. Veltraa died when his flagship, ''Reliance'', was destroyed with all hands lost.|An article in ''The Admiral's List'' regarding Veltraa's death|<ref name="jimas" />}}
'''Jimas Veltraa''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] who served in the early [[Standard day/Legends|days]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. By [[3964 BBY]], Veltraa was in command of [[Gender/Legends|his]] own [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], [[Reliance (Mandalorian Wars)|''Reliance'']], and served on the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]], meant to guard the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] from [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|marauders]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the Mandalorians broke out toward Taris, and the line was shattered—Veltraa reformed what was left of the Republic [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] into a patchwork force protecting the world. Although Veltraa and his forces held out to the end, ''Reliance'' was destroyed and Veltraa [[Death/Legends|killed in action]] during the Mandalorian [[Taris Siege|siege]]. Veltraa was honored for his valor on the Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and later had a [[Veltraa|Republic warship]] named after him.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Speaking at the memorial service, the Chancellor credited Veltraa's sacrifice with delaying the Mandalorians' siege of Taris, which is still ongoing.|''The Admiral's List''|<ref name="jimas" />}}
A [[Gender/Legends|male]], Jimas Veltraa was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] following the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]. Although by [[3964 BBY]] the epic battles with the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] had passed, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], and the [[Navy/Legends|Navy]] that Veltraa served, found itself facing a new enemy when the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Soldier/Legends|warrior]] clans started a [[Mandalorian Wars|crusade]] against the Republic on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. As the Mandalorians began to threaten resource [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] near the [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]], the Navy formed a defensive cordon known as the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]]. By then, Veltraa was in command of his own [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], [[Reliance (Mandalorian Wars)|''Reliance'']]. Eventually, the line collapsed,<ref name="jimas" /> and the Mandalorians broke out toward Taris after a diversionary [[Battle of Vanquo|attack]] on the planet [[Vanquo]]. Forced to choose between minding the frontier and the home front,<ref name="kotor8">[[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]]</ref> Veltraa,<ref name="jimas" /> alongside Admiral [[Noma Sommos]],<ref name="kotor8" /> reacted by reforming the remnants of the Outer Rim [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] into a makeshift force protecting Taris. Although Veltraa held out in the face of the invaders, ''Reliance'' was destroyed in the Mandalorian [[Taris Siege|attack]] on Taris, with all hands, including the admiral, [[Death/Legends|lost]].<ref name="jimas" />

Veltraa was memorialized on the Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and honored for his heroism, with [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Tol Cressa]] giving a speech crediting Veltraa with delaying the Mandalorian [[Clone Wars Gambit: Siege|siege]]. Although there was talk of renaming a new class of [[Warship/Legends|warship]] recently approved for construction at [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] after Veltraa, the Chancellor supported keeping the original name, the [[Interdictor-class cruiser|''Interdictor''-class]], which Veltraa had proposed. In the wake of Veltraa's death, newly promoted Admiral [[Saul Karath]], who was not able to attend the Coruscant ceremony, sent a message honoring the late admiral and dedicated his next campaign against the invaders to Veltraa's memory. These events were described in an edition of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'', the official publication of the Republic Navy, dedicated to Veltraa's memory.<ref name="jimas" /> In addition, a Republic [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruiser]] was named after the late admiral—the ''[[Veltraa]]'' was ready for action by the [[3963 BBY|next year]], becoming the first command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dallan Morvis]].<ref name="kotor31">[[Knights of the Old Republic 31|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 31]]</ref>

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|You'd rather rent than own.|Jimas Veltraa, regarding irregular military units|<ref name="errant" />}}
After his death, Veltraa was renowned for his bravery and valor in combat, and his ability to effectively organize and command disparate forces in desperate [[Time/Legends|times]].<ref name="jimas" /> Veltraa was also known for his chilly view on irregular military units, being quoted as saying "you'd rather rent than own."<ref name="errant">[[Knight Errant (novel)|''Knight Errant'']]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Admiral Veltraa was first mentioned in [[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] written by [[John Jackson Miller]]<ref name="kotor8" /> and released on [[September 20]], [[2006]].<ref name="DH">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/12-894/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-8|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #8}}</ref> His first name was mentioned as Jimas in ''[[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]]'', an [[in-universe]] news report appearing on the last page of [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 13]],<ref name="jimas" /> which was released on [[January 31]], [[2007]].<ref name="DH2">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/14-394/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-13|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #13}}</ref>
